informal_pl: arcsin x = arctan(x/√(1−x²)) na (-1,1); świadek nie używa arccos by uniknąć cykliczności (chunk 067 zależy od arcsin).
informal_en: arcsin x = arctan(x/√(1−x²)) on (-1,1); witness avoids arccos to break circularity (chunk 067 depends on arcsin).
lean_target_signature: theorem emlterm1c_for_arcsin : ∃ t : EMLTermℂ₁, ∀ x : ℝ, -1 < x → x < 1 → (EMLTermℂ₁.eval (x : ℂ) t).re = Real.arcsin x := by sorry
notes: Round 2 chunk; Table S2 step 31. RECIPE ADJUSTMENT: paper writes arcsin = π/2 − arccos but our chain has arccos depending on arcsin, so we use arctan(x/√(1−x²)) instead — equivalent on the open interval (−1, 1). The flaky-witness discussion in §1.3 of the supplement also notes this circular dependency.
